sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114887" key="xrusokogxu/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-κογχύλιον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[χῡ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a <sense id="n114887.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gold shell,</tr_> i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rolled gold,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.44B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.44B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
